title: Section 49
content: In the North-Eastern Hill University Act, 1973,-- (i) in section 1, in sub-section (2), for the words "States of Meghalaya and Arunachal Pradesh", the words "State of Meghalaya" shall be substituted; (ii) in section 2, in clause (l), for the words "States of Meghalaya and Arunachal Pradesh", the words "State of Meghalaya" shall be substituted; (iii) in section 6, in sub-section (1), for the words "States of Meghalaya and Arunachal Pradesh", the words "State of Meghalaya" shall be substituted.
